---
title: "simple barcoding plots"
author: "Srishti Arya"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    df_print: paged
    code_fold: show
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(Biostrings)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggridges)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(taxize)
library(viridis)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

options(scipen = 999)
```


## read and contig counts across processing
```{r alluvial plot, fig.height=5, fig.width=4}
palette <- c("#2d6a4f", "#40916c", "#74c69d",  # forest greens
             "#023e8a", "#0077b6", "#48cae4")  # ocean blues

stats_list <- list.files(path = "../../../stats", pattern = "*tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
stats_files <- lapply(stats_list, read_tsv)

parse_stats_function <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    # split the single column on 2+ spaces
    separate(1, 
             into = c("file", "format", "type", "num_seqs", "sum_len",
                      "min_len", "avg_len", "max_len"),
             sep = "\\s{2,}",
             extra = "drop") %>%
    mutate(
      num_seqs = as.numeric(str_remove_all(num_seqs, ",")),
      # extract dataset from the start of the file path
      dataset  = str_extract(file, "^[^/]+")
    )
}

parsed_stats_list <- lapply(stats_files, parse_stats_function)

parsed_stats_list_renamed <- list(
  COI_cleaned = parsed_stats_list[[1]],
  COI_contigs = parsed_stats_list[[2]],
  Demultiplexed     = parsed_stats_list[[3]],
  Pychopper_cleaned   = parsed_stats_list[[4]],
  rDNA_18S    = parsed_stats_list[[5]] %>% mutate(dataset = str_extract(file, "BW_plate[0-9]+|Lakes_day[0-9]+")),
  rDNA_28S    = parsed_stats_list[[6]] %>% mutate(dataset = str_extract(file, "BW_plate[0-9]+|Lakes_day[0-9]+")),
  rDNA_contigs= parsed_stats_list[[7]]
)

summarise_stage_function <- function(df, stage_name) {
  df %>%
    group_by(dataset) %>%
    summarise(count = sum(num_seqs, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(stage = stage_name)
}

parsed_stats_summarised_list <- list(
  s_Pychopper_cleaned = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$Pychopper_cleaned, "Pychopper cleaned"),
  s_Demultiplexed   = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$Demultiplexed, "Demultiplexed"),

  s_COI_contigs  = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$COI_contigs, "AmpliconSorted COI"),
  s_rDNA_contigs = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$rDNA_contigs, "AmpliconSorted rDNA"),

  s_18S = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$rDNA_18S, "18S"),
  s_28S = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$rDNA_28S, "28S"),
  s_COI_cleaned   = summarise_stage_function(parsed_stats_list_renamed$COI_cleaned, "COI")
)

stage_levels <- c("Pychopper cleaned", "Demultiplexed", "AmpliconSorted COI", 
                  "AmpliconSorted rDNA", "18S", "28S", "COI")

alluvial_df <- bind_rows(
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Pychopper_cleaned, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Demultiplexed, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_rDNA, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_contigs, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_18S, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_28S, 
  parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_cleaned
) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stage, levels = stage_levels))

# Panel 1: Pychopper_cleaned → Demultiplexed → AmpliconSorted COI / rDNA
stage_levels_p1 <- c("Pychopper cleaned", "Demultiplexed", "AmpliconSorted COI", "AmpliconSorted rDNA")

df_p1 <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Pychopper_cleaned, 
                   parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_Demultiplexed) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stringr::str_wrap(stage, width = 10),
                        levels = stringr::str_wrap(stage_levels_p1, width = 10)))

p1 <- ggplot(df_p1,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "Pychopper Cleaned → Demultiplexed", x = NULL, y = "Read Count", fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none")


# For each dataset, rDNA splits into 18S AND 28S
stage_levels_p2a <- c("AmpliconSorted rDNA", "18S")

df_p2a <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_rDNA_contigs,
                    parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_18S) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stringr::str_wrap(stage, width = 10),
                        levels = stringr::str_wrap(stage_levels_p2a, width = 10)))

p2a <- ggplot(df_p2a,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "rDNA AS → 18S gene", x = NULL, y = "Contig count", fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

stage_levels_p2b <- c("AmpliconSorted rDNA", "28S")

df_p2b <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_rDNA_contigs,
                    parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_28S) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stringr::str_wrap(stage, width = 10),
                        levels = stringr::str_wrap(stage_levels_p2b, width = 10)))

p2b <- ggplot(df_p2b,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "rDNA AS → 28S gene", x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))

# Panel 3: AmpliconSorted COI → COI final
stage_levels_p3 <- c("AmpliconSorted COI", "COI")

df_p3 <- bind_rows(parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_contigs,
                   parsed_stats_summarised_list$s_COI_cleaned) %>%
  mutate(stage = factor(stringr::str_wrap(stage, width = 10),
                        levels = stringr::str_wrap(stage_levels_p3, width = 10)))

p3 <- ggplot(df_p3,
       aes(x = stage, y = count,
           alluvium = dataset, stratum = dataset,
           fill = dataset)) +
  geom_flow(stat = "alluvium", aes.flow = "forward", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_stratum(alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
  labs(title = "COI AS → COI gene", x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))
```

```{r plots for contigs per dataset per amplicon, fig.height=5, fig.width=8}
barcode_colours <- c("maroon4",
                     "steelblue4",
                     "darkolivegreen")

filenames <- list.files(path = "../../../barcoding summaries/", pattern="*tsv", full.names = TRUE) # stats from auxiliary_code/amplicon_summary.R

data <- read_tsv(filenames, col_names = TRUE, id = "file") %>% 
  mutate(
    amplicon = case_when(
      grepl("18S", file) ~ "18S",
      grepl("28S", file) ~ "28S",
      TRUE ~ "COI"),
    dataset = case_when(
      grepl("BW_plate1", file) ~ "BW_plate1",
      grepl("BW_plate2", file) ~ "BW_plate2",
      grepl("BW_plate3", file) ~ "BW_plate3",
      grepl("Lakes_day1", file) ~ "Lakes_day1",
      grepl("Lakes_day2", file) ~ "Lakes_day2",
      TRUE ~ "Lakes_day3"),
  )

contig_counts <-
  data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = sample, y = num_hits, fill = amplicon))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge")+
  labs(y = "number of hits")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = barcode_colours)+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8)+
  facet_wrap(~dataset + amplicon, scales = "free_x", nrow = 3)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
```

```{r, fig.height=6, fig.width=11}
Supp_fig_2GH<-
  (p1 / (p2a + p2b + p3) | contig_counts) +
  plot_layout(guides = 'collect') &
  theme(legend.position   = 'bottom',
        legend.direction  = 'horizontal')

ggsave(
  filename = "plots/Supp_fig_2GH.pdf",
  plot = Supp_fig_2GH,
  width = 11,
  height = 6
)
```
